papers.title: From Noise to Intent: Anchoring Generative VLA Policies with Residual Bridges
papers.abstract_snippet: Bridging high-level semantic understanding with low-level physical control remains a persistent challenge in embodied intelligence, stemming from the fundamental spatiotemporal scale mismatch between cognition and action. Existing generative VLA policies typically adopt a "Generation-from-Noise" paradigm, which disregards this disparity, leading to representation inefficiency and weak condition alignment during optimization. In this work, we propose ResVLA, an architecture that shifts the paradi
papers.reason: 提出残差桥接机制，将高层语义意图锚定到低层物理控制，解决生成式VLA的时空尺度失配问题。该方法为优化现有扩散/自回归策略提供了新的架构思路，具有明确的工程复用价值。

papers.title: Closed-loop tactile-visual interactivity via chip-free luminescent fibers enabled by capacitive coupling
papers.reason: 属于新型触觉传感器硬件研究（Science Advances），聚焦材料科学与传感原理，未涉及VLA算法、策略学习或机器人控制闭环，与当前VLA核心研究方向无直接关联。

papers.title: A time-stamping tactile sensor enabled by pseudoconductive interface design at dielectric heterojunctions
papers.reason: 属于新型触觉传感器硬件研究（Science Advances），聚焦介电异质结界面设计与时间戳技术，未涉及VLA算法或具身智能决策，与当前VLA核心研究方向无直接关联。
